name: Chinese: General Tsao's Chicken 1
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1 in pieces
3 Hot dried chili peppers, broken in half
1 Piece ginger root (1 in), peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok.
2. Deep fry the chicken, a few pieces at a time, about 1 minute or until golden brown. Remove and drain on paper towels.
3. Pour all but 2 tbsp of the oil out of the wok.
4. To the remaining oil, add the chili peppers, garlic, and ginger. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, combine the remaining soy sauce, vinegar, white wine, and cornstarch. Mix until smooth. Stir in sugar, sesame oil, and salt.
6. Pour the mixture into the wok, cook, stirring, for 2 minutes until thickened.
7. Return the chicken pieces to the wok, mix well, and serve.
